Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the collagen in the food, I feel[n]like the texture of my skin has improved...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I drank every drop of[n]the collagen-rich soup...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the plump pork belly,[n]my skin feels more supple...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I felt my body's radiance[n]increase with each bite...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The pork belly and boiled eggs are delicious.[n]Every cell in my body is rejoicing...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The special-made pork belly[n]is bursting with collagen...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my skin has become smoother...![n]{f 1 1}
